- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a mobile chess game screen with a highlighted checkmate header and a chessboard view with several pieces marked by colored squares.

A chessboard fills the lower portion of the screen, shown in a top-down grid of alternating light gray and darker gray squares. Multiple chess pieces are visible, including a white king icon on a left-side square with a red highlight, a black queen with a crown-like top shape on a left upper area with a yellow highlight square nearby, and a black rook-like piece on a lower middle area with its own yellow highlight square. There is also a black king-like piece with a crown and a small cross on top appearing near the bottom area, and a black pawn at the bottom right. The pieces are rendered as simple dark and light silhouettes with visible chess-move highlights indicating specific squares.

Setting:
This appears to be an indoor, screen-based mobile chess match interface. The top and bottom sections show status bars and player panels, while the board occupies the middle and lower area. Lighting and weather are not applicable because it is a digital UI.

Visual Details:
At the very top, there is a dark status bar with small circular and signal-style icons and a yellow circular icon near the top right. Centered near the top is large white text with a thick outline reading “CHECKMATE!”. Below that, there are move notation elements in a single row within a rounded dark panel, including small heart and chess-piece icons, and a highlighted move choice shown in a rounded rectangle. On the left side of the UI, a back arrow icon appears. On the right side near the top, there are small controls, including a share-like icon. The username panels appear along the middle top area and the bottom area, each with a circular profile image on the left side of the panel and a timer on the right; the top panel shows a timer of “06:09” and the bottom panel shows “06:07”. The board highlights include a red-outlined square around the white king area and a yellow highlighted square near the black rook area. The camera angle is fixed and orthographic, aligned with the grid.

The image displays a mobile chess game interface announcing a checkmate scenario. The chessboard shows several pieces with highlighted squares indicating key moves or threats, along with player names and countdown timers.
